name: RPlog_Danik_and_Sandor_Talk
title: Danik and Sandor Talk
summary: Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin summons the captured defector Sandor Woden to his lavish office, greeting his former protege with fatherly warmth rather than the execution Sandor expects. Danik presses Sandor to abandon the Republic and return to the Empire, arguing that the Jedi Ai'kani has clouded his judgment and that love is fleeting, while Sandor stands firm that he fights for Ai'kani and for peace even at the cost of his life. The exchange turns violent as Danik, drawing on hidden dark-side power, slices Sandor's stun-cuffs and lunges with his Corellian Rapier; Sandor dodges and makes a desperate grab for a glass, only for Danik to reveal that Ai'kani is already coming to rescue him, walking into a trap. Defeated, Sandor surrenders, and the two settle into an uneasy, almost gentlemanly conversation over Thyferran brandy about the morale and state of the New Republic military. Danik finally has Sandor taken to a cell to await transport to the capital, intending to use him as bait for Ai'kani.
